title: Adani Green Energy Adds Record 5 GW Of Renewable Capacity In FY26
description: Ahmedabad, April 1 (IANS) Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) on Wednesday said it added over 5 GW (5,051 MW) of renewable energy capacity in the financial year 2025–26, taking its total operational portfolio to 19.3 gigawatts (GW).
